_comment_intent: Phase 1 ACL — owner only. No outsiders. No friend tunnel. Friend access lives in a separate AmneziaWG stack (Phase 3).

acls._comment: Owner devices can reach the home server on any port
Owner devices can talk to each other (e.g. phone <-> laptop)

_comment_default_deny: Anything not matched above is denied. Future friend account would NOT be in group:owner, so they're rejected from home-server traffic by default.
